taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Electrical and Controls Engineering, Automation Engineer
core_skills: Python, Pandas, Matplotlib, Relational databases, Postgres
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, Pandas:1.0, Matplotlib:0.0, Relational databases:1.0, Postgres:0.5
must_have_quals: BS and a minimum of 3 years relevant industry experience, Proficient developer with 3+ years proven programming skills using Python, Pandas, Matplotlib and other key related tools, Solid knowledge and experience with relational database (e.g Postgres) and non-relational database (e.g.Mango DB). Ability to write complex queries with SQL is required, Experience with dashboards and interactive reports. Proficiency in data visualization tools (such as Tableau) and a strong understanding of data manipulation and querying using SQL and Python together, Ability to think creatively and identify, build, and support solutions and roadmaps focused on automation and reduction of manual processes
preferred_quals: Master's degree in data science or computer science or machine learning is preferred, Proficient in scripting or programming languages such as Python, Java, C/C++ with 5+ years of proven programming skills, Advanced SQL skills with the ability to write complex joins and nested queries, Proficiency in data visualization tools (such as Tableau, D3) and strong understanding of data manipulation and querying using SQL and Python together, Experience with dashboards and interactive reports. Ability to work with large datasets and conduct data cleaning and transformation, Experience with automation tools and frameworks, e.g. Jenkins, Gitlab CI/CD, Ability to leverage data science algorithms and machine-learning models to solve various kinds of issues, Experience in utilizing analytics and statistical methods to transform data into useful insights and actionable results, Ability to think creatively and identify, build, and support solutions and roadmaps focused on automation and reduction of manual processes, Strong critical thinking and communication skills with the ability and desire to learn and evaluate new technologies
core_responsibilities: Develop new features to enhance the automation system based on the business’s needs, Develop and maintain real-time data processing pipelines to ensure processing accuracy and efficiency, Collaborate closely with AI/ML engineers to integrate new AI pipelines and ML models into the production system and ensure achieving expected results and efficiency, Integrate various internal tools and external tools into the existing automation system and/or data processing pipelines to enable new applications, Provide technical support for users and help troubleshoot issues to unblock projects
job_summary: Apple is a leading technology company known for its innovative products and services. As a Cellular Data & Automation Engineer, you will develop new features for test automation systems and work on state-of-the-art data processing pipelines leveraging data science algorithms and machine learning models. You will collaborate with firmware engineering teams to enhance automation systems and improve product performance.
